channel.title: Georgian Mathematical Journal
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Georgian Mathematical Journal

item.title: Fractional p-Laplacian elliptic Dirichlet problems
item.description: Article by Joanna Jureczko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gmj-2024-2008

item.title: Group invertibility of the sum in rings and its applications
item.description: Article by Joanna Jureczko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gmj-2024-2010

item.title: σ-symmetric amenability of Banach algebras
item.description: Article by Joanna Jureczko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gmj-2024-2011

item.title: Generalized Stockwell transforms: Spherical mean operators and applications
item.description: Article by Joanna Jureczko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gmj-2024-2014

item.title: Existence of positive weak solutions for stationary fractional Laplacian problem by using sub-super solutions
item.description: Article by Joanna Jureczko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gmj-2024-2025

item.title: Capacity in Besov and Triebel–Lizorkin spaces with generalized smoothness
item.description: Article by Joanna Jureczko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gmj-2024-2015

item.title: Existence of solutions for (p(y),q(y))-Laplacian elliptic problem on an exterior domain
item.description: Article by Joanna Jureczko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gmj-2024-2022

item.title: Degeneration phenomenon in linear ordinary differential equations
item.description: Article by Joanna Jureczko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gmj-2024-2007

item.title: Weak type estimates of genuine Calderón–Zygmund operators on the local Morrey spaces associated with ball quasi-Banach function spaces
item.description: Article by Joanna Jureczko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gmj-2024-2013

item.title: Generalized derivation on semiprime and prime Banach algebras
item.description: Article by Joanna Jureczko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gmj-2024-2027

item.title: Weak positive solutions to singular quasilinear elliptic equation
item.description: Article by Joanna Jureczko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gmj-2024-2020

item.title: Constructions and characterizations of mixed reverse-order laws for the Moore–Penrose inverse and group inverse
item.description: Article by Joanna Jureczko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gmj-2024-2016

item.title: Integral inequalities of Ostrowski type for two kinds of s-logarithmically convex functions
item.description: Article by Joanna Jureczko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gmj-2024-2018

item.title: On the polar dualities and star dualities of the quasi Lp -intersection bodies

item.title: New estimates for the Berezin number of Hilbert space operators
item.description: Article by Joanna Jureczko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gmj-2024-2012

item.title: Addendum to On Kuratowski partitions in the Marczewski and Laver structures and Ellentuck topology
